item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends. i hope you had a frank and productive christmas holiday
what have they done to you, Michael
as is tradition
insane
current neighbors are pretty cool
you need pet hair? got that
speaking of anxiety..
chief.. sir.. brochacho
well.. sort of
ranch and bbq
dude, oversharing
i relate to this bc i'm a degenerate
sorry about this one
dying as a champ. can't beat that!
i have questions
i guess
mmm hmm
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I really do
item.description: It's silly, it's dumb, but it makes me happy. Go Team Acorn! Side note, bring back Secret Santa.

item.title: Specificity. Today: Tilda Swinton as libraries and other architectural sites
item.description:
There's more than 30 of these.
I cannot tell you how absolutely delighted I was to find these.
I love Tilda Swinton.
Now enjoy, please!

item.title: Don’t let Imgur bury what we want!!!!

item.title: Have some wholesome moments to unwind as the year nears its end.
item.description:
Barn dooooooors.
Sorry about all the nasty looking subs.
- I knew it. - What? - You did this on purpose, bastards. Look at this. - *unintelligible* - If the others have it too *unintelligible* - *laughter*
*more laughter*
*Staaaaaaaaph*
How does she make that teapot float?
limblossboss : https://www.instagram.com/limblossboss

item.title: Poor kitty.
item.description: She's obviously lying about feeding him twice a day with snacks in-between because he seems like he's always hungry. I mean sure, he's pretty overweight, but he wouldn't lie about not being fed. Cats are known for their integrity and honesty.

item.dc:creator: LustyLombax

item.title: Hey look over there, the stock market is hitting record highs
item.description:
I'm sure the incoming administration will take all this very seriously and take steps to staff the responsible govt agencies accordingly /s It's 70 degrees and raining in Texas. Thisisfine.gif https://www.sciencealert.com/even-nasa-cant-explain-the-alarming-surge-in-global-heat-were-seeing Most Viral Edit: Thanks for the upvotes y'all! If we are talking about viable solutions, I propose we hear out Crab People. We clearly dropped the ball as custodians of this planet, maybe Crab People can do better. Worst case scenario, we taste like crab and talk like people. I see no downsides to this arrangement.
Dog tax: Duke and Charlie. Duke is a climate change denier, Charlie can't read so he has no opinions, he's just happy to be involved.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Waiting for the rest of Team Pinecone to get out of work and help catch up like
item.dc:creator: SarahTheEverlame

item.title: Bottom shelf shitposter vs a angry internet troll.
item.description:
An* angry >:( God. I deserve to be bullied.
Don't put your username on statements you don't want screenshot and memed.
Don't be cruel to someone who LOVES shitposting.
I bet @BrdCdn is a pinecone >:(
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax. anywho...if you love memes but hate ads, check out discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
